name: HRY_EVENT_CATEGORIES_VL
query: SELECT hry_event_categories.EVENT_CATEGORY_ID EVENT_CATEGORY_ID, hry_event_categories.BASE_CATEGORY_NAME BASE_CATEGORY_NAME, hry_event_categories.ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY ATTRIBUTE_CATEGORY, hry_event_categories.ATTRIBUTE1 ATTRIBUTE1, hry_event_categories.ATTRIBUTE2 ATTRIBUTE2, hry_event_categories.ATTRIBUTE3 ATTRIBUTE3, hry_event_categories.ATTRIBUTE4 ATTRIBUTE4, hry_event_categories.ATTRIBUTE5 ATTRIBUTE5, hry_event_categories.ATTRIBUTE6 ATTRIBUTE6, hry_event_categories.ATTRIBUTE7 ATTRIBUTE7, hry_event_categories.ATTRIBUTE8 ATTRIBUTE8, hry_event_categories.ATTRIBUTE9 ATTRIBUTE9, hry_event_categories.ATTRIBUTE10 ATTRIBUTE10, hry_event_categories.PRIORITY PRIORITY, hry_event_categories.RETENTION_DAYS RETENTION_DAYS, hry_event_categories.LEGISLATION_CODE LEGISLATION_CODE, hry_event_categories.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, hry_event_categories.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, hry_event_categories.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, hry_event_categories.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, hry_event_categories.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, hry_event_categories.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, hry_event_categories.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, hry_event_categories.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, hry_event_categories.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, hry_event_categories.SGUID SGUID, hry_event_categories.SEED_DATA_SOURCE SEED_DATA_SOURCE, hry_event_categories.ORA_SEED_SET1 ORA_SEED_SET1, hry_event_categories.ORA_SEED_SET2 ORA_SEED_SET2, hry_event_categories_tl.CATEGORY_NAME CATEGORY_NAME, hry_event_categories_tl.DESCRIPTION DESCRIPTION FROM hry_event_categories, hry_event_categories_tl WHERE hry_event_categories.EVENT_CATEGORY_ID = hry_event_categories_tl.EVENT_CATEGORY_ID AND hry_event_categories_tl.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
